name: Format Money Value
short_description: Formats a numerical value as a currency string with two decimal places and a dollar sign prefix.

inputs.name: x
inputs.description: The numerical value to be formatted as currency.

name: Format Decimal as Percentage String
short_description: Formats a decimal number (e.g., 0.05) into a percentage string with two decimal places (e.g., '5.00%').

inputs.name: p
inputs.description: The decimal value to be formatted as a percentage (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).

name: Years Left Until Retirement
short_description: Calculates the number of years remaining until a specified retirement age, ensuring the result is at least 1.

inputs.name: current_age
inputs.description: The individual's current age.

inputs.name: retirement_age
inputs.description: The target age for retirement.

name: Additional Annual Savings for Retirement (No Returns)
short_description: Calculates the additional annual savings required to reach a retirement target, assuming no investment returns on any savings.

inputs.name: age
inputs.description: The person's current age.

inputs.name: retirement_age
inputs.description: The target age for retirement.

inputs.name: target_savings
inputs.description: The total desired savings amount at retirement.

inputs.name: current_savings
inputs.description: The amount of savings accumulated to date.

inputs.name: annual_savings
inputs.description: The amount already being saved annually.

name: Years to Target Savings (No Returns)
short_description: Calculates the number of years required to reach a target savings amount, given current savings and constant annual contributions, assuming no investment returns.

inputs.name: target_savings
inputs.description: The desired total savings amount to be reached.

inputs.name: current_savings
inputs.description: The amount currently saved.

inputs.name: annual_savings
inputs.description: The amount saved annually.

name: Retirement Savings: Current Balance + Annuity
short_description: Calculates the future value of retirement savings, combining the growth of current savings with end-of-year contributions (ordinary annuity) at an annual return rate.

inputs.name: current_savings
inputs.description: The current amount of money saved.

inputs.name: annual_savings
inputs.description: The amount contributed at the end of each year (ordinary annuity).

inputs.name: r
inputs.description: The annual investment return rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).

inputs.name: current_age
inputs.description: The person's current age.

inputs.name: retirement_age
inputs.description: The age at which the person plans to retire.

name: Nominal Retirement Target with Inflation
short_description: Convert a target expressed in today's dollars into the nominal amount needed at retirement using inflation g.

inputs.name: current_age
inputs.description: Current age of the individual.

inputs.name: retirement_age
inputs.description: Desired age of retirement.

inputs.name: target_today
inputs.description: Desired amount in today's purchasing power at retirement.

inputs.name: g_pct
inputs.description: Annual inflation rate as a percentage (e.g., 3.5 for 3.5%).

name: Early Retirement Feasibility
short_description: Calculates if current savings and future contributions are sufficient to fund desired withdrawals for a specified retirement period, considering pre- and post-retirement investment returns.

inputs.name: current_age
inputs.description: The individual's current age.

inputs.name: early_retire_age
inputs.description: The target age for early retirement.

inputs.name: current_savings
inputs.description: The current amount of money saved for retirement.

inputs.name: annual_savings
inputs.description: The amount saved at the end of each year before retirement (ordinary annuity).

inputs.name: r_pre_pct
inputs.description: The annual investment return rate (as a percentage) before retirement.

inputs.name: r_post_pct
inputs.description: The annual investment return rate (as a percentage) during retirement.

inputs.name: annual_withdrawal
inputs.description: The annual amount withdrawn at the end of each year during retirement (ordinary annuity).

inputs.name: life_expectancy
inputs.description: The projected life expectancy, determining the total years of withdrawal.

name: Generate Financial Templates
short_description: A utility function to generate multiple instances of various financial templates with random seeds and save them to a JSON file.

inputs.name: output_file
inputs.description: The file path where the generated problems will be saved.

inputs.name: num_instances
inputs.description: The number of problem instances to generate for each template.
